description:
Holy crap 100 followers...

THANK YOU ALL SO MUCH!!!!

I can’t believe that this is honestly happening, for most of my time on jan-ai I was just a user, a commenter. That was all, but after getting the courage to post my first bot because of some great people who I look up to.

(then subsequently losing said ambition from the update)

I honestly never really thought I would make bots, let alone for 100 people! So I’ll do my best on the next one. I feel it’s only fair to make one for a special right?

Your local goblin

Wendigo

(Also yes this was made before I got the 100th follower. I think it was made at 94/98)
creator: wendigone
